examples: A membranous part that divides or separates.
A double - membranous Surface thermocouple used in ceramic materials has been developed.
Membranous nephropathy.This kidney disorder is the result of thickening membranes within the glomeruli.
Inside is a soft structure of membrane (membranous labyrinth) that's a slightly smaller, similarly shaped version of the bony labyrinth.
The membranous labyrinth contains a fluid (endolymph) and is lined with hair-like sensors that respond to movement of the fluid.
